items.html: AVI [Aba ve Ima] required only one Zivug [coupling], of Arich; but ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] required two Zivugim: one of AA [Arich Anpin], and one of AVI. The reason is that AVI already had their existence through the Dikna [beard] and the hairs of the head of AA, and they lacked only the discernment of their NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] and the Mochin — for the one depends on the other, the NHY on the coming of the Mochin, as mentioned there. But ZON as yet had no existence at all; therefore the first Zivug, of AA, was needed to bring forth his first existence, to make him the discernment of "three comprised in three," through the first Ibur [conception] — for this discernment is the essential one, being the root of ZA [Zeir Anpin]; and afterwards came the second Ibur, of the Mochin, through the Zivug of AVI.
